name: Lemony Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together butter, sugar, and salt until pale and fluffy.
2. Beat in the egg, egg yolk, lemon juice, and vanilla extract until well blended.
3. Gradually add flour to the mixture using a mixer on low speed.
4. Divide the dough into two equal pieces and wrap each piece in plastic wrap.
5. Chill the dough for 3 hours or until firm enough to roll out.
6. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
7. Cut the rolled dough into cookies with a cookie cutter and decorate as desired.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) on greased cookie sheets for 12 minutes, or until lightly browned around the edges.
9. Cool the cookies on wire racks.
Note: This is one of my favorite Christmas cookies that I make every year. The key to a great flavor is using fresh lemon juice.
